chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 643 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 15.09.2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant Khadim Hussain is present on interim pre-arrest bail, submits that vide order dated 22.08.2023, passed by learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I/MTMC, Mirpur Mathelo, the very case has been disposed of on the basis of compromise. A copy of such order, he has placed on record and does not press this bail application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Surety is discharged, which shall be returned on identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
